title: Subplans Manifest
description: Schema for subplans.manifest.json produced by the Plan Decomposer

decomposedFromPlanId.description: ID of the original integrated plan

subPlans.description: Ordered list of sub-plans; implementor runs once per sub-plan

scopeLabel.description: Human-readable scope label (e.g. Core, TestData, Web)

projects.description: Project names in this sub-plan's scope

dependsOn.description: Sub-plan indices this depends on (empty for first)

templateForLaterSubPlans.description: If true, this sub-plan's output templates files for later sub-plans

allowedFiles.description: Guard rail: only these files may be touched by implementor for this sub-plan

scopedPlanPath.description: Path to the dedicated scoped plan for this sub-plan
